markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To align on Q1 content strategy and manage the account transition.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Q1 Strategy:** The content strategy will shift to an organic-first approach, prioritizing refreshing high-performing Governance content (65–75%) to prevent decay and updating legacy GRC content (25–35%) to correct inaccuracies.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [**SMB Audience:** SMBs will be addressed via dedicated pre-IPO/founder-focused articles and integrated H2 headings within enterprise content, not as a separate content stream.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**Account Transition:** Vivek Shankar is the new primary contact, taking over from Jo Kaminska. The transition is underway and will be complete by early December.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [**Production Cadence:** December's 20-article target is on track. To avoid holiday bottlenecks, Diligent will front-load reviews, with Kezia Farnham approving SEO and coordinating with John's team.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

## Topics

### Account Transition

  - [Vivek Shankar (GrowthX) is the new primary contact, replacing Jo Kaminska.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [The transition is underway, with Jo and Vivek collaborating.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Kezia Farnham (Diligent) will provide support to ensure a smooth handover.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### Q1 Content Strategy

  - [**Strategic Shift:** The strategy is now organic-first, driven by data and direction from Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [This approach is independent of other teams (PR, Product Marketing) to ensure content is built from the ground up for organic performance.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Q1 Focus (Proposed):**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**65–75% Governance:** Refresh high-performing content to prevent decay and integrate AI offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**25–35% GRC:** Update legacy content, prioritizing pages with inaccurate information.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**SMB Audience Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Dedicated Content:** Create articles for the pre-IPO/founder audience (e.g., "exit plan for startup") to position Diligent as the next-step solution.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Integrated Content:** Use H2 headings within enterprise articles to address SMB considerations.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This avoids diluting the primary intent of enterprise topics while still serving the SMB audience.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Content Opportunities & Data

  - [**Governance Keyword Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Kezia will share a 3,000+ keyword list from a previous OnBoard analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [GrowthX will analyze it to find new opportunities, especially for AI-related terms.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Goal:** Refine the list into a focused Q1 roadmap targeting high-value features (e.g., voting, meeting minutes).](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [**Product Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [Product priorities are still being defined.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [Kezia is analyzing organic sessions and AI referral traffic to inform decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [**Initial finding:** "Audit analytics" shows strong performance on commercial terms.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [**Reporting Enhancement:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [Diligent requested product-level tagging in the "scrunch data" for better filtering and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [GrowthX confirmed this is feasible and will be addressed in Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Pipeline & Reviews

  - [**November Production:** 20 articles published; target met.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [**December Pipeline:** 17 articles in motion.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [1 ready to publish](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [7 in review (Diligent)](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [9 in production (GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [**Review Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [Kezia will front-load reviews to avoid holiday bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
      - [Kezia has already approved the 7 articles currently in review from an SEO perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [GrowthX will send 5–6 more articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kezia:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [Review the "Topics in Consideration" sheet → move best topics to "Approve to Start" to balance SMB/Enterprise content.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [Review the comparison post drafts → send to the legal team for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [Share the 3,000+ keyword list with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Provide updated product priority data to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [Coordinate with John's team to ensure timely content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [Send 5–6 more articles for review this week.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [Analyze the 3,000+ keyword list to identify new opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Implement product-level tagging in the "scrunch data" in Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/zyTCWbqw6FjMTWyShaogdCsxyGPz4fx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
